title: Nami Fights to Keep the Treasure
description: On pages 8–11, Nami’s obsession with treasure collides with Luffy’s blunt honesty and Buggy’s chaos.
scene: Nami tries to protect what she has stolen or earned, while the surrounding fight keeps pulling her deeper into the Straw Hats’ orbit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The kid in the straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: BUT THIS TIME YOU WON'T ESCAPE ME!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm just here for the map and the treasure!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: you're outsiders... KOFF... not your fight!

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: It's my town and I'LL protect it!

summary: The part keeps Nami morally complicated: she is selfish, clever, and frightened, but also increasingly tied to Luffy and Zoro.
